description: icons8.github.io hosts documentation and release notes pages for Icons8 products, especially the Lunacy design tool. The actual developer APIs linked from the site are served on other domains such as developers.icons8.com, not on icons8.github.io itself.
summary: icons8.github.io itself exposes documentation pages for Lunacy, but no public programmatic integration surfaces on the icons8.github.io domain (no HTTP API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI endpoint documented there).
